summary: SEO-Friendly Public URLs + Enhanced Public Venue Pages - Full Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All SEO features working correctly - slug-based URLs, dynamic meta tags, JSON-LD schema, city listing pages with hero/filters/venue grid, enhanced venue detail pages with gallery/stats/amenities/reviews/FAQ/related venues/CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend venues.py: Well-structured SEO endpoints - /cities, /city/{slug}, /city/{slug}/{venue_slug} with proper aggregation and filtering
Frontend CityVenuesPage.js: Clean implementation with useSEO hook for meta tags, ItemList JSON-LD schema
Frontend VenuePublicPage.js: Comprehensive venue detail page with EventVenue JSON-LD schema, aggregateRating support
VenueCard.js: Smart link generation - uses city_slug+slug when available, falls back to venue_id for backward compat
useSEO.js: Custom hook handles document.title, meta tags, canonical links, and JSON-LD without react-helmet dependency
App.js: VenueOrCityPage component properly discriminates between venue_id (starts with 'venue_') and city slugs

test_credentials.public_endpoints: No auth required for all SEO endpoints

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing venue data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO-Friendly URLs fully implemented and tested. New public endpoints: (1) GET /api/venues/cities returns cities with venue counts, slugs, and areas. (2) GET /api/venues/city/{city_slug} returns venues in a city with filters. (3) GET /api/venues/city/{city_slug}/{venue_slug} returns full venue detail with reviews and related venues. Frontend pages: CityVenuesPage.js at /venues/{city} and VenuePublicPage.js at /venues/{city}/{slug}. Legacy /venues/{venue_id} URLs still work via VenueOrCityPage wrapper. Footer city links updated to SEO-friendly URLs. JSON-LD schema markup (ItemList for cities, EventVenue for venues) injected via useSEO hook.

GET /api/venues/cities.returns: Array of cities with city, slug, state, venue_count, areas, sample_image, min_price, max_capacity

GET /api/venues/city/delhi.returns: city, city_slug, state, areas, total, venues array with slug fields

GET /api/venues/city/delhi/the-grand-imp.returns: Full venue data with reviews array and related_venues array

CityVenuesPage /venues/delhi.title: Best Wedding & Event Venues in Delhi | BookMyVenue
components: Hero with city name and state

seo.title: Dynamic with city name
seo.meta_description: Contains city name and venue count

VenuePublicPage /venues/delhi/the-grand-.title: The Grand Imperial - Connaught Place, Delhi | BookMyVenue

seo.title: Dynamic with venue name, area, city
